introSection: Vekoma Tsunami is a steel roller coaster from Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at South Sabahiya Park in South Sabahiya, Al Ahmadi, Kuwait. The ride was previously known as Flying Tiger at Safariland Stukenbrock in Stukenbrock, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. From 1981 to 2007, the ride was originally named Super Tornado.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a curved first drop and two individual corkscrew inversions. The station has a bend in the middle.

fullText:
Vekoma Tsunami is a steel roller coaster from Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at South Sabahiya Park in South Sabahiya, Al Ahmadi, Kuwait. The ride was previously known as Flying Tiger at Safariland Stukenbrock in Stukenbrock, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. From 1981 to 2007, the ride was originally named Super Tornado.

The ride has a curved first drop and two individual corkscrew inversions. The station has a bend in the middle.

Yellow track and green supports.
